use_cases: A simple increment/decrement counter for numerical input in forms and dashboards
Suitable for quantity selectors in e-commerce product pages
Used as a stepper control for adjusting values in settings or configuration panels
Can serve as a basic interactive element in tutorials or onboarding flows
Functions as a foundation component for building more complex number input systems
ai_summary: A minimal counter component featuring increment and decrement buttons that manage a numeric state value. Built with React and Tailwind CSS, this atomic component serves as a reusable building block for numerical input controls across various applications and platforms.
